task_completion.description: Verify that the Firefox browser is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Firefox browser window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the OpenMaint URL.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Firefox address bar contains 'localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/' (or similar) and the OpenMaint/CMDBuild login page is displayed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct login credentials are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The username field contains 'admin' and the password field contains bullets/asterisks (representing 'admin') on the OpenMaint login page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into OpenMaint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main OpenMaint (CMDBuild) application interface is visible, showing navigation menus and a dashboard or default view, indicating the login was successful.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Buildings section is accessed and displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Buildings' section is highlighted or selected in the navigation menu, and the main content area displays a list or cards view of building records (typically showing 5 demo records).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Firefox browser to access the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interaction happens within the Firefox graphical user interface, not via terminal commands like curl or python scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the login was performed through the web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the login form fields and clicking the login button, rather than bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshots show the genuine OpenMaint web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a real web application with proper styling, navigation, and data tables, not a text editor or a manually created static HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The application is OpenMaint 2.4 (CMDBuild 4.1.0) accessible at http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/. The correct login credentials are username 'admin' and password 'admin'. When successfully logged in and navigated to the Buildings section, the interface should display exactly 5 demo building records in a list or cards view.
